mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_post_id.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO posts ( post_id, user_id, board_id, title, content_posts, price, category, location, status, view_count, created_at_posts ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{boardId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{price}, #{category}, #{location}, #{status}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.buyer_id, p.board_id, p.title, p.content_posts AS content, p.price, p.category, p.location, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at_posts, img.image_url AS main_image_url FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_img img ON p.post_id = img.post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y' ORDER BY p.created_at_posts DESC

SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.buyer_id, p.board_id, p.title, p.content_posts AS content, p.price, p.category, p.location, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at_posts, img.image_url AS main_image_url FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_img img ON p.post_id = img.post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y' WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
